status: Bootstrapped — Preclinical-Dominant Evidence Base — Not Platinum Certified
plain_english_summary: BPC-157 is a synthetic 15-amino-acid peptide with a large preclinical literature covering tissue repair, vascular signalling and gastrointestinal protection, but only sparse and methodologically limited human evidence. Certiaura therefore treats it as a preclinical-dominant research asset rather than an established human therapy.
certification_blockers: Direct primary-source extraction incomplete for the bootstrap evidence set
Human knee-pain evidence requires methodological appraisal
Human interstitial-cystitis pilot requires methodological appraisal
Regulatory status requires jurisdiction-specific current review
Anti-doping implications require explicit user warning
Independent replication and confirmatory trials are limited
